description: On-device chat via Chrome's LanguageModel API. Optionally page-aware via context selector. Inline endpoint and external deep-link fallbacks. Conforms to admin/specs/ai-page-tools-v1.md.

attributes.name: context
attributes.description: CSS selector of a page region whose text is folded into the system prompt. Empty = general chat.

attributes.name: context-label
attributes.description: Human-friendly label for the context region (shown in the ribbon and used in the system prompt header).

attributes.name: system
attributes.description: System-prompt prefix. May also be supplied via <template data-role='system'>; attribute wins.

attributes.name: placeholder
attributes.description: Textarea placeholder text. Reactive via attributeChangedCallback.

attributes.name: endpoint
attributes.description: Inline-fallback HTTP URL (POST JSON, streamed text/plain or one-shot application/json).

attributes.name: fallback-label
attributes.description: Override the deep-link option label in the chat-window provider select.

attributes.name: fallback-prompt
attributes.description: Override the {prompt} string substituted into fallback-url.

attributes.name: data-context-state
attributes.description: Reflects extracted page context size against the Nano budget.

events.name: ai-chat:message
events.description: Fires once per completed message (user or assistant).

events.name: ai-chat:context-overflow
events.description: Bubbled from the underlying session's contextoverflow event.

methods.name: reset()
methods.description: Destroy the current session and clear the log.
